Now I shall explain the method of worshipping the Deities
drawn in their res peel ive places inside the circle or mystic diagram.
As for the planets, the same method as expounded in the Tutrd in
connection with the Planetary Sacrifices should be adhered to. The
Danavas, Daityas and Pi^acas are to be worshipped with flesh, rice,
liquor etc.; the Manes with oil bath, collyrium, sesamura, meat and
rice; the sages with the hymns of the Sama, Yajus and Rg Vedas,
perfumes, incense and garlands; the Serpents with unmixed colours
and the triple sweetâ€”a mixture of honey, ghee and sugar, the Gods
with incense, ghee, oblations, garlands, gems, invocations and
salutations; the Gandharvas and the nymphs with excellent
perfumes and sweet smelling garlands; the remaining Deities (such
as YakÂ§as) with multi-coloured food-offerings. All the Deities should
be worshipped and also strings dipped in saffron-paste, clothes,
